  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

  Log:

  - Remove DOCSDIR and NOPORTDOCS checks - Not bundled by upstream anymore
  - Update and sort pkg-plist
  
  PR:             ports/169102
  Submitted by:   koobs <koobs.freebsd@gmail.com>
